title: Declarative API Validation — +k8s:beta
text:
Description:
The
+k8s:beta
tag enables
enforced mode
for validation rules migrating from hand-written logic, controlled by the
DeclarativeValidationBeta
feature gate. Do not use this tag for net-new API fields, which should apply declarative validation tags directly.
After a validation rule has been evaluated in shadow mode (via
+k8s:alpha
), it is promoted to beta. When
DeclarativeValidationBeta
is enabled (the default),
+k8s:beta
rules are enforced and authoritative. Disabling the feature gate reverts
+k8s:beta
rules to shadow mode, providing a rollback mechanism if regressions occur.
Stability Level:
Stable
Arguments:
since
(string, required): The Kubernetes version in which the validation was promoted to beta.
Payload:
<validation-tag>
: The standard declarative validation tag to be enforced (e.g.,
+k8s:minimum=1
).
Usage Example:
type
MyStruct
struct
{
// +k8s:beta(since:"1.37")=+k8s:minimum=1
MyField
int
`json:"myField"`
}
